channel.title: Sun & Swim
channel.description: Water workouts & swim style for summer

item.title: Pool Workouts That Feel Like Play but Burn Like a Gym Session
item.description: Fun pool workouts that torch calories without the sweat or joint strain — beginner-friendly water exercises that feel more like play than a workout.

item.title: Water Aerobics: Full Body Workout in the Pool
item.description: Try this low-impact, high-effectiveness pool workout
